steps.title: Use the value of y
steps.content: The second equation gives $y=19$. Substitute into $y=4x-9$: $$19=4x-9$$

steps.title: Solve for x
steps.content: Add $9$ to both sides and divide by $4$: $$28=4x$$ $$x=7$$

steps.title: Confirm the ordered pair
steps.content: The solution is $(7,19)$, which is choice B.

steps.title: Check both coordinates
steps.content: A solution to a system must satisfy both equations. The pair $(7,19)$ has $y=19$, and it also satisfies $19=4(7)-9$, so both equations are true.
